name: gmail
description: Read Gmail profile, search messages, and inspect message metadata through a plugin-owned OAuth connector.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Gmail with Google OAuth and expose read-only mail tools.
interface.longDescription: A built-in plugin that exercises the full plugin-owned connector flow with Google OAuth, a local stdio MCP wrapper, and runtime token injection.

connectors.name: Gmail
connectors.description: Google OAuth connector for read-only Gmail access.
permissions: Starts a bundled local Gmail MCP wrapper.
Requests read-only Gmail access from Google.
Sends Gmail API requests to gmail.googleapis.com.

configFields.label: Google OAuth client ID
configFields.description: OAuth client ID from Google Cloud. Register http://localhost:1455/auth/callback as an authorized redirect URI.

configFields.label: Google OAuth client secret
configFields.description: OAuth client secret from the same Google Desktop OAuth client. Google requires it during token exchange.

tools.name: gmail_profile
tools.title: Gmail Profile
tools.description: Read the connected Gmail profile summary.

tools.name: gmail_search_messages
tools.title: Search Gmail
tools.description: Search Gmail messages with Gmail search syntax.

tools.name: gmail_read_message
tools.title: Read Gmail Message
tools.description: Read headers and snippet for a Gmail message.

installReview: Requires a Google OAuth desktop client ID and client secret configured for the local callback URL.
Uses the read-only Gmail API scope.
Runs a local stdio MCP wrapper bundled with the plugin.
